title: ferray-random: standard_normal uses Box-Muller instead of Ziggurat — slower
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy uses the Ziggurat algorithm for standard normal generation, which is ~3x faster than Box-Muller. ferray-random uses Box-Muller (normal.rs: standard_normal_pair) which requires two uniform samples, a log, a sqrt, and two trig operations per pair. Ziggurat avoids transcendentals in ~97% of cases by precomputing a table of rectangular regions under the normal PDF. This directly impacts the performance of any code that generates large amounts of normal data (ML, Monte Carlo, etc.). Implement Ziggurat for f64 and f32.
